scripts.start:local: concurrently -n api,web --no-color "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.start:hub: npm run build:web && npm run start:dev -w apps/api
scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run dev:api'; npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:cf-pages: sh -c 'if [ -z "$PAGES_PROJECT_NAME" ]; then echo "Set PAGES_PROJECT_NAME in Cloudflare (your Pages project name, same as *.pages.dev slug)."; exit 1; fi; exec npx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/out --project-name="$PAGES_PROJECT_NAME"'
scripts.ensure:data: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run prisma:seed -w apps/api && npm run prisma:import:recipes -w apps/api
